response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced full-stack and systems software developer with over 16 years of broad engineering experience, but his background is almost entirely in web, mobile, and application-layer development using TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. The Principal Performance Architect role requires deep specialization in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, and deep neural network workload optimization — none of which appear in this resume. His recent AI-adjacent work involves MCP tooling and agentic workflow infrastructure at the application layer, which is categorically different from the hardware-level performance engineering this role demands.
strengths: 16+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded domains
Demonstrated low-latency and performance-oriented systems work at Sociomantic using DLang with async I/O and high-performance databases
Some hardware-adjacent exposure through robotic arm development and embedded systems work at Altom Consulting
concerns: Zero experience with SoC/IP modeling, chip architecture, or hardware performance simulation — the core technical requirement of the role
No background in AI/deep learning workload optimization, GPU architecture, or SIMD/MIMD parallel computing

Educational background (BS Computer Science) paired with experience profile does not satisfy the 8+ years of relevant experience threshold, as his years are in web and application engineering rather than hardware or systems architecture

key_factors.factor: No SoC/IP or hardware modeling experience
No AI/DL workload or GPU architecture expertise
